conversation.content: Hey there! Nice to meet you! 😊 What kind of food do you love to cook, or what's your favorite movie to watch? (You can answer in simple words or mix Chinese - I'll help!)

Hello! Nice to meet you too! 😊 I like to cook... um, I like to cook rice and vegetables. 也喜欢吃饺子! My favorite movie... um, I think is "Kung Fu Panda." I love the panda! It is very funny. What's your favorite food?
Oh, I love dumplings too! 😋 My favorite food is pizza. It's so tasty! I can eat it every week. Do you like pizza?
Umm, yes! I like pizza. 🍕 It’s very good! I like cheese and... um, maybe pepperoni? But I not eat it every week. I eat it sometimes. My friend say pizza have many kinds! Do you like other food too?
Oh, pepperoni is great! 😋 I also like tacos. They are spicy and fun to eat! Do you like spicy food?
Um, spicy food... I not sure. I eat spicy sometimes. 辣的食物有点太多! 😅 I like, um, some spicy but not too much. It make me... um, hot? Yes, hot in my mouth! Do you think tacos very spicy?
I see! 😄 Tacos can be spicy, but you can make them less spicy too. I like them with mild salsa. What do you like on your tacos?
Um, I like taco with... um, meat. Maybe beef? Yes, beef! And I like lettuce and, um, tomato. I not like too much spicy sauce. Maybe just a little. I think it good!  Do you like more?
Oh, that sounds yummy! 😋 I love tacos with chicken too! Chicken is so tasty with lettuce and cheese. Do you like cheese on your tacos?

Um, cheese... I not sure. I like cheese, but sometimes too much is too... um, oily? Yes, oily! I like a little cheese on taco, maybe like... um, sprinkle? Not too much. How about you? You like a lot cheese?
I get that! 😊 A little cheese is perfect. I like cheese, but not too much either. Just enough to make it tasty! Do you like other toppings on your tacos?
